action.description:
Introduced by Senators Spreitzer, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Habush Sinykin, L. Johnson, Ratcliff, Roys, Wall and Hesselbein; 
cosponsored by Representatives Anderson, Joers, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Johnson, Mayadev, McCarville, Palmeri, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sinicki, Spaude, Stubbs, Subeck, Taylor, Udell, Haywood, Prado and Tenorio
